title: Inconsistency Biases in Dynamic Data Pruning
authors: Q Zhou, T Yang, B Zhao, H Zhang, J Gao, Q Wang
description: A study of inconsistency bias in dynamic data pruning, examining how resampling, local-window pruning, and cumulative temporal rescaling affect training dynamics.

title: RLI-DM: Robust Layout-Based Iterative Diffusion Model for SAR-to-RGB Image Translation
authors: B Zhao, C Yang, Q Zhou, Q Wang
journal: IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing (T-GRS)
description: A novel diffusion-based model for translating SAR images to optical (RGB) images, enhancing structural consistency.

title: MMO-IG: Multi-Class and Multi-Scale Object Image Generation for Remote Sensing
authors: C Yang, B Zhao, Q Zhou, Q Wang
journal: IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing (T-GRS)
description: A generative framework for synthesizing remote sensing objects across categories and spatial scales.

title: Edge Approximation Text Detector
authors: C Yang, X Han, T Han, H Han, B Zhao, Q Wang
journal: IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology (T-CSVT)
description: A text detection approach that improves localization by modeling contour structure and edge approximation.

title: Traffic sign interpretation via natural language description
authors: C Yang, K Zhuang, M Chen, H Ma, X Han, T Han, C Guo, H Han, B Zhao, ...
journal: IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems (T-ITS)
description: An interpretable framework that connects traffic sign understanding with natural language generation.
